title: White House accuses Moonshot of distilling Anthropic’s Fable to build Kimi K3
summary: A senior White House official has accused China’s Moonshot AI of breaking US export controls to build Kimi K3. Moonshot distilled Anthropic’s Fable model to build K3, Kratsios said.
caption: output/2026-07-23/white-house-accuses-moonshot-of-distilling-anthropic-s-fable-to-build-.txt
